Kumo

Selection, command & date family

Nine components generated for React, Vue, Svelte, and Solid with SSR-safe initial markup and hydration behavior.

  • Radio — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • Autocomplete — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • Combobox — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • CommandPalette — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • DatePicker — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • DateRangePicker — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • DropdownMenu — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • Toasty — keyboard and ARIA contract included
  • Pagination — keyboard and ARIA contract included

Open React runtime
